# Copilot Instructions for Overtime Archive

This repository is responsible for OTA only.

Do not directly implement changes for external projects from this repository.

External projects:

- kueper-knowledge-graph
- solarsciencefoundation / SSF
- noxiagame / NOXIA
- kueper.com

When work in OTA requires a change in another project, describe it as an External Task.

The Kueper Knowledge Graph is the single source of truth for shared knowledge records. OTA documents may reference graph IDs but should not redefine graph-owned records.
